# UK Charts Archive

> The complete UK singles and albums chart archive from 1952 to present.

This site provides a searchable, browsable archive of every UK singles and albums chart since the first chart was published on 14 November 1952. Data is sourced from the Official Charts Company.

## Features
- Every UK Number One single and album
- Full weekly Top 100 singles and albums charts
- Search by artist, song title, or date
- Birthday Number One lookup
- Welsh artists in the UK charts
- One-Hit Wonder Hall of Fame
- Chart statistics and trends
- Top 40 Era Time Machine (1952-present)

## Data Coverage
- Singles charts: 1952 to present (weekly updates)
- Albums charts: 1956 to present (weekly updates)
- Over 70 years of British music chart history

## URL
https://ukcharts.netlify.app

## Contact
This is a personal archive project. Data is presented for educational and entertainment purposes.
